scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker -c auto "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present --include-workspace-root=false -w packages/shared -w packages/env -w packages/ui -w packages/database -w packages/nodes -w apps/api -w apps/web -w apps/worker
scripts.check: npm run env:check && npm run db:validate && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.env:check: npm run build -w packages/env && node scripts/validate-env.cjs
scripts.env:check:api: npm run build -w packages/env && node scripts/validate-env.cjs api
scripts.env:check:web: npm run build -w packages/env && node scripts/validate-env.cjs web
scripts.env:check:worker: npm run build -w packages/env && node scripts/validate-env.cjs worker
